zh.lifeSummary: 當Margery de Bolebec於1241年出生在英國諾圖波藍德可哈姆時，她的父親Hugh de Bolebec46歲，母親Tiphaine De Bailliol35歲。她於1281年11月1日與Ralph Fitzwilliam在古巴皮納爾 德爾 德爾里奧羅雅爾結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1301年2月之前在英國波藍德格斯托可。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margery de Bolebec于1241年出生在英国諾圖波藍德可哈姆时，她的父亲Hugh de Bolebec46岁，母亲Tiphaine De Bailliol35岁。她于1281年11月1日与Ralph Fitzwilliam在古巴皮納爾 德爾 德爾里奧羅雅爾结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1301年2月之前在英国波藍德格斯托可。

nameMeanings.name: Margery
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual medieval vernacular form of   Margaret   (now also commonly spelled   Marjorie  ). This form of the name is preserved in the nursery rhyme ‘See-saw, Margery Daw’.

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of any of the given names beginning with the letter D- ( compare Jay and Kay ), in particular Dorothy . It is also used as an independent name, and may in some cases be associated with the River Dee ( compare Clyde ).

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Margery de Bolebec was born in 1241, in Hexham, Northumberland, England, her father, Hugh de Bolebec, was 46 and her mother, Tiphaine De Bailliol, was 35. She married Ralph Fitzwilliam on 1 November 1281, in Royal, Pinar del Río, Cuba. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. She died before February 1301, in Greystoke, Cumberland, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margery de Bolebec est née en 1241, à Hexham, Northumberland, Angleterre, son père, Hugh de Bolebec, avait 46 ans et sa mère, Tiphaine De Bailliol, avait 35 ans. Elle a épousé Ralph Fitzwilliam le 1 novembre 1281, à Royal, Pinar del Río, Cuba. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée avant février 1301, à Greystoke, Cumberland, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margery de Bolebec 1241 in Hexham, Northumberland, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Hugh de Bolebec 46 und ihre Mutter Tiphaine De Bailliol 35. Sie hat am 1. November 1281 in Royal, Pinar del Río, Kuba Ralph Fitzwilliam geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb vor Februar 1301 in Greystoke, Cumberland, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margery de Bolebec è nata il nel 1241 nel Hexham, Northumberland, England, sua padre, Hugh de Bolebec, aveva 46 anni e sua madre, Tiphaine De Bailliol, aveva 35 anni. Lei sposato Ralph Fitzwilliam il 1 novembre 1281, nel Royal, Pinar del Río, Cuba. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì prima del febbraio 1301, nel Greystoke, Cumberland, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Margery de Bolebecが1241年にイギリスノースウンバーランドヘクスハムで生まれた時，父Hugh de Bolebecは46歳，母Tiphaine De Bailliolは35歳であった。1281年11月1日にキューバピナル デル ルiオロイアルでRalph Fitzwilliamと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1301年2月以前にイギリスクウンバーランドグレイストクで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Margery de Bolebec(이)가 1241년 영국 노르스벌랜드 헤스함에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Hugh de Bolebec(은)는 46세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Tiphaine De Bailliol(은)는 35세였다. 그녀는 1281년 11월 1일 쿠바 핀아르 데 i오 로야에서 Ralph Fitzwilliam(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1301년 2월 이전 영국 c벌랜드 그리스토크에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margery de Bolebec nasceu em 1241, em Hexham, Northumberland, Inglaterra, seu pai, Hugh de Bolebec, tinha 46 anos e sua mãe, Tiphaine De Bailliol, tinha 35 anos. Ela casou-se com Ralph Fitzwilliam em 1 de novembro de 1281, em Royal, Pinar del Río, Cuba. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu antes fevereiro de 1301, em Greystoke, Cumberland, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margery de Bolebec родилась в 1241 г. в местности хексхам, нортумбирланд, Англия, её отцу по имени Hugh de Bolebec было 46 лет, а матери, которую звали Tiphaine De Bailliol, 35. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Ralph Fitzwilliam 1 ноября 1281 г. в местности рояль, пинар дель рiо, Куба. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла перед февраль 1301 г. в местности гристок, кумбирланд, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margery de Bolebec nació en 1241, en Hexham, Northumberland, Inglaterra, su papá, Hugh de Bolebec, tenía 46 años y su mamá, Tiphaine De Bailliol, tenía 35 años. Se casó con Ralph Fitzwilliam el 1 de noviembre de 1281, en Royal, Pinar del Río, Cuba. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió antes de febrero de 1301, en Greystoke, Cumberland, Inglaterra.
